title: Skifflin
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''skifflin''' was the subject of a common saying throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]: "the skifflin is out of the sack," meaning a secret was uncovered.<ref name="GG3-2">[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back'', Second Edition]]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
In the first edition of ''[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back]]'', skifflin was spelled "'''Skliffin'''."

==Sources==
*<!-- 1989-XX-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back]]''
*<!-- 1996-XX-XX -->[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back'', Second Edition]]
